events.agenda: Networking event for data professionals featuring talks on DataOps for balanced data science teams (Home Depot) and modernizing data engineering (Chick-fil-A).
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader analytics engineering, data stack, and data ops topics.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Mar 29, 2023, 4:45 PM to 8:00 PM EDT

7000 Central Pkwy, Sandy Springs, GA

Atlanta dbt Meetup [In Person]

Agenda:
5:30-6:00 Brent Brewington (Home Depot): Using dbt to drive DataOps on a Data Science balanced team
6:00-6:30 Aaron Reese (Chick-fil-A): Modernizing Data Engineering at CFA

Presentation #1: Using dbt to drive DataOps on a Data Science balanced team. Walking through how Home Depot Services Data Science uses dbt & DataOps to take a systematic, modular approach to data for ML, building foundational data so Data Scientists can minimize data cleaning.

Presentation #2: Modernizing Data Engineering at CFA. Learn how dbt is helping CFA bring engineering velocity and increased collaboration to analytics initiatives.

talks.description: How Home Depot Services Data Science uses dbt and DataOps to build foundational data for ML, minimizing data cleaning work for data scientists.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 5:30 - 6:00 | Brent Brewington (Home Depot): Using dbt to drive DataOps on a Data Science balanced team
talks.title: Using dbt to drive DataOps on a Data Science balanced team

talks.description: How Chick-fil-A modernized its data engineering practices using dbt to bring engineering velocity and collaboration to analytics initiatives.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:00 - 6:30| Aaron Reese (Chick-fil-A): Modernizing Data Engineering at CFA
talks.title: Modernizing Data Engineering at CFA

Presentation #3: Data Modernization - Not Just a Technical Problem. Strategies used at Salesloft to improve the Data team's agility, with a heavy slant toward processes and team topologies rather than pure technical capabilities.

Agenda:
5:30-6:00 Speaker #1: Mahtab Rahman, Cox Automotive

Mahtab Rahman is Sr. Director of Architecture at Cox Automotive, responsible for scalable and sustainable development and delivery of data and analytics capabilities throughout the enterprise.

Grant Cloud is Senior Director of Data Strategy at PrizePicks, overseeing data engineering, data science & business intelligence teams.

7000 Central Pkwy, Sandy Springs, GA

Agenda:
5:30-6:00 Somnath Chateerjee and Brett Darcy (Cox Automotive) - Shifting Gears: How Cox Automotive Turbocharged Data Engineering with ELT

Presentation #1: Shifting Gears: How Cox Automotive Turbocharged Data Engineering with ELT. Migration from a modern ETL tool to a more conscious Data Engineering mindset with dbt; the reason, philosophy and strategy of the shift.
